title: 529 College Savings Plan
html:
Stub. 529 plan — US tax-advantaged savings account for education expenses. State-sponsored, contributions grow tax-deferred, withdrawals tax-free if used for qualified education costs. Queued by Yahir as the next savings vehicle after IDA match-trigger per 2026 01 09 ida account meta.

Open questions

  • Beneficiary: Maya (younger sister)? Self?
  • State plan: Oregon (where Yahir's IDA likely lives) or Texas (current residence)?

Related

  • ida individual development account
  • matched savings
  • bridge income strategies

related.label: IDA Account Meta — savings ledger + 3:1 match goal + 529 todo
